import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut tok = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn first_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = first_line()
let line2 = first_line()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target_str = string.trim(line2)
let target = match string.parse_int(target_str)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match list.index_of(nums, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
